channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: All 50 states join federal initiative to address foster home shortage
item.description: All 50 states, along with Washington, D.C., and Puerto Rico, have signed on to a federal effort to improve the ratio of licensed foster homes to children in need.

item.title: Congressman Khanna says Israeli settlers detained him in West Bank
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna reported being held by Israeli settlers during his visit to the West Bank on Wednesday.

item.title: Could Life Have Originated on Mars?
item.description: Steve Benner's book Meet the Neighbors presents bold and intriguing theories.

item.title: Putin Has Already Lost the War in Ukraine
item.description: The remaining uncertainty is how the conflict will ultimately conclude.
